scan.title: Scan bridges
scan.subtitle: Check whether Tor bridges are reachable from your network across all transport types.
scan.ipv6Hint: Fetch the IPv6 list (collector transports only)
scan.deepVerifyHint: Launch the real obfs4 client to confirm an actual handshake (desktop; requires the PT binary or Tor Browser)
scan.emptyHint: Paste bridge lines above and hit Scan to see reachability results.

deep.title: obfs4 client required
deep.body: Deep verify launches the real obfs4 client (lyrebird or obfs4proxy) to confirm an actual handshake, not just TCP reachability. None was found on your system.
deep.lookHere: Install it (or Tor Browser), then turn Deep verify on again. BridgeHop looks for the client here:

msg.addOne: Add at least one bridge line.
msg.desktopScan: Scanning is only available in the desktop app.
msg.desktopSources: Loading sources is only available in the desktop app.
msg.desktopDeep: Deep verify is only available in the desktop app.
msg.desktopQr: QR codes are only available in the desktop app.
msg.desktopSave: Saving files is only available in the desktop app.
msg.importEmpty: No bridges found in that file.
msg.desktopImport: Importing files is only available in the desktop app.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Bridges you've scanned, ranked by reliability across every recorded run.
library.empty: No bridges yet. Scan some bridges and they'll appear here with reliability stats.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Past scan runs. Each scan you run is recorded here.
history.empty: No scans recorded yet. Run a scan to start building history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Appearance, language, and more.
settings.appearanceNote: Choose between the light and dark theme.
settings.languageNote: Choose the display language. Right-to-left languages are laid out accordingly.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: BridgeHop - a lightweight Tor bridge reachability scanner.
about.tagline: Check whether Tor bridges are reachable from your network across every transport type, with built-in lists, live sources, history, and reliability tracking.
about.donateIntro: If BridgeHop is useful to you, a small donation helps keep the Hop apps maintained.
about.bridgeSourcesIntro: Where BridgeHop's built-in lists and live sources come from.
about.frontedNote: Fronted transports (snowflake, meek-azure, conjure, dnstt) use the built-in defaults shipped with Tor Browser.
about.licenseNote: BridgeHop is free software, licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 or later.
